name: chain_rented_out_my_dormant_linkedin_account_f
method: Rented out my dormant LinkedIn account for B2B outreach ($40/mo)

stages.task: Scan r/SideHustle, r/Entrepreneur, relevant Discord servers for 'LinkedIn account rent/sell' listings weekly
Filter for accounts with 500+ connections, active history, niche match (B2B/SaaS/agency). Score 0-10 on rental value.
Match qualified accounts against existing hot leads (17,413 in pipeline) seeking LinkedIn outreach. Auto-draft broker intro email proposing 3-month rental at $40-80/mo, broker takes 25%.
Log active rentals, collect broker fee via Stripe Payment Link, update KPI dashboard
